description: Generate a publication-quality scientific schematic from a natural-language prompt via OpenRouter (Nano Banana 2 image model + Gemini 3.1 Pro quality review with smart iterative refinement).
rules: writes the final image to record_store/schematic.png plus iteration versions and a review log
OPENROUTER_API_KEY required — the op is a live network call
usage: Set PROMPT. Optional DOC_TYPE, ITERATIONS, OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: schematic.png + *_review_log.json + generate_schematic_summary.json.
limitation: Requires network access to OpenRouter and a valid OPENROUTER_API_KEY; the requests library must be installed. Without an API key the porter records a structured 'no API key' note and produces no image.
